## Checklist
- [ ] YAML entry added/modified in the appropriate catalog
- [ ] Wiki article added/modified at `Wiki/Vices/[ID].md`
- [ ] No duplicate IDs (checked existing catalog)
- [ ] Entry follows the format in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Severity is honest (not inflated)
- [ ] Examples are real code, not pseudocode
- [ ] Title is descriptive, not dramatic
